$schema_comment: Intent-to-implementation map for Guardian. Routes relative to BASE_URL. shared_constants.js: global-loader-overlay, theme-toggle-btn.

modules.semantic_fallback: Login card with Email and Password fields and a primary Login button
modules.success_criteria: Navigation to command-center.html; session stored in localStorage for Supabase

modules.semantic_fallback: Full-width blue primary button labeled Login below the password field
modules.success_criteria: URL ends with command-center.html or auth-error stays empty on success

modules.semantic_fallback: Circular refresh icon button in the AI Daily Briefing card header
modules.success_criteria: Briefing area updates; placeholder or container #ai-briefing-container visible

modules.semantic_fallback: Plus icon button in My Tasks card header
modules.success_criteria: #quick-add-card form #quick-add-task-form is visible for inline task entry

modules.semantic_fallback: Inline form under My Tasks with Description, optional contact/account links, due date, Add button
modules.success_criteria: New task row appears in #my-tasks-list after submit (requires valid data)

modules.semantic_fallback: Due / Upcoming toggle pills in Sequence Steps card
modules.success_criteria: #sequence-steps-list content reflects selected tab

modules.semantic_fallback: Scrollable list under Recent Activities on dashboard right column
modules.success_criteria: List populated or empty state after data load

modules.semantic_fallback: List icon vs grid icon toggle top-right of Deals pipeline section
modules.success_criteria: #list-view-container visible vs #kanban-board-view visible (has .hidden when inactive)

modules.semantic_fallback: Plus icon next to Deal Pipeline title — opens new deal flow
modules.success_criteria: Modal or #new-deal-inline-container shows deal creation UI

modules.semantic_fallback: Single-user icon vs users-group icon beside Deals page title
modules.success_criteria: Metrics and table refresh; manager may see #manager-pipeline-select-wrap

modules.semantic_fallback: Top metric cards: Current Commit, Best Case, Funnel dollar values
modules.success_criteria: Numeric values render after loader dismiss

modules.semantic_fallback: Small Reset text control in the filter row under Deal Pipeline
modules.success_criteria: Committed/stage/close-month pills return to default selection

modules.semantic_fallback: Search input at top of left contact picker panel
modules.success_criteria: #contact-list filters to matching contacts

modules.semantic_fallback: Plus icon in bottom action bar of contact picker
modules.success_criteria: Empty form in #contact-form; focus on new contact entry

modules.semantic_fallback: Floppy-disk save icon in Contact Details form
modules.success_criteria: Contact persists; #contact-last-saved may update

modules.semantic_fallback: Trash icon next to save in Contact Details
modules.success_criteria: Contact removed after confirm; list updates

modules.semantic_fallback: First / Last segmented control above contact list
modules.success_criteria: Contact list order changes

modules.semantic_fallback: AI-Curated Content area below Social Hub intro copy
modules.success_criteria: Article cards load or empty container after API

modules.semantic_fallback: From Our Marketing Team card body
modules.success_criteria: Marketing post items render

modules.semantic_fallback: Clicking share on an article opens Prepare Your Post modal with #post-text
modules.success_criteria: #post-text visible; #modal-article-link populated

modules.semantic_fallback: Regenerate button with wand icon under custom prompt in post modal
modules.success_criteria: #post-text content changes after AI round-trip

modules.semantic_fallback: Copy icon in modal action bar
modules.success_criteria: Clipboard contains suggested post text

modules.semantic_fallback: Account picker search
modules.success_criteria: #account-list reflects filter

modules.semantic_fallback: Plus then save floppy on account form
modules.success_criteria: New account in list; #account-last-saved or list row

modules.semantic_fallback: List vs org chart on account detail
modules.success_criteria: #contact-list-view vs org chart visible

modules.semantic_fallback: Proposal Elements checkboxes
modules.success_criteria: #impact-roi-section or #custom-text-section-0 shown

modules.semantic_fallback: RFP and Business name fields
modules.success_criteria: Inputs hold values; ready for compile

modules.semantic_fallback: Site MRR fields drive global TCV/IRR
modules.success_criteria: Global aggregates change when MRR changes

modules.success_criteria: Sequence in #sequence-list; details panel populated
